failedAssertions.reason: Claude Code and Codex platform views render the empty state even though the sidebar badges and SQLite database both show installed skills.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Platform view skill cards never rendered for populated agents, so parsed name/description metadata was not visible in the user surface.
Platform view skill cards never rendered for populated agents, so the mixed symlink/copy source indicators could not be verified.
The Central Skills refresh surface stayed empty because the scanner classified all central skills with `is_central = 0`, leaving no baseline data to verify manual rescan behavior.
The scanner classified central skills as non-central when `codex` shared `~/.agents/skills/`, so the Central Skills view had no rows to validate deduplicated link status.
Blocked by `VAL-PLAT-001`: no skill cards rendered for populated platform views, so source indicators were absent.
Blocked by `VAL-PLAT-001`: the search box had no rendered skill cards to filter in populated platform views.
Blocked by `VAL-PLAT-001`: no platform skill cards rendered, so there was nothing clickable to validate navigation into the next-milestone detail route.
The scanner stored every central-directory skill with `is_central = 0`, so `get_central_skills` returned an empty list while the sidebar badge still showed 3.
Blocked by `VAL-CENT-001`: the Central Skills list never rendered canonical skill rows, so per-platform link badges were absent.
Blocked by `VAL-CENT-001`: the Central Skills list never rendered canonical skill rows, so no `Install to...` dialog could be opened.
Blocked by `VAL-CENT-001`: the Central Skills list never rendered a canonical skill row to initiate a symlink install flow.
Blocked by `VAL-CENT-001`: the Central Skills list never rendered a canonical skill row to initiate a batch install flow.
Blocked by `VAL-CENT-001`: the Central Skills list never rendered canonical skill rows, so central-search behavior could not be exercised.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented a reliable macOS-native fallback for Tauri validation using PyObjC ApplicationServices AXUIElement button presses plus Quartz window capture when browser preview and System Events are insufficient.
